subcodes.first_line: O Rubabih! Thy letter hath been mentioned. Blessed is the tongue that calleth unto God through His words and utterances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربابه نامه ات مذکور طوبی از برای لسانیکه حق را بکلمات او خوانده و ببیانات
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
